articles.title: More or Less quiz: Celebrate the start of the World Cup with our ranking challenge

children.content: Which team has won the most World Cup matches? Has anyone lost more than England? Take our World Cup ranking quiz to find out.

articles.title: A record number of over 40s are at this World Cup. Here's why

children.content: A record number of players over 40 will feature at this year's World Cup. So what part does sports science play in keeping the likes of Cristiano Ronaldo on the pitch longer?

items.title: How you and your superannuation came to be aboard SpaceX

children.content: If your superannuation is managed by any of Australia's big superannuation funds, chances are you're about to become a highly valued financial backer to Elon Musk.

items.title: Amex ordered to compensate man whose ex accessed his data

children.content: Australia's privacy commissioner has threatened a complainant with legal action to prevent the full disclosure of findings of a long-running investigation into American Express's information security that found widespread technology failures.

image.altText: A modern office building with an American Express sign.

items.title: 'Broken promise' or not, Albanese's tax decision helps One Nation

children.content: There are multiple reasons why alienated voters might be generously donating to One Nation's campaign, including the prime minister's cavalier breaking of election promises that has poured kerosene on the fire under a party that can no longer be called "minor".

items.title: Falling currencies, rising inflation put pressure on international students

items.title: This man bought the land stolen from his Indigenous ancestors

items.title: Are YouTubers taking over the film industry?

children.content: YouTube is changing the film industry - it's place where young filmmakers can find and build an audience.
More and more YouTube stars are making the jump into mainstream films.
So, are YouTubers are taking over the film industry?
